# 001 — Initialize shadcn/ui

## What to build
Initialize shadcn/ui for the project with Tailwind v4 support.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] components.json exists with correct Tailwind v4 config
- [ ] lib/utils.ts exists with cn() utility (clsx + tailwind-merge)
- [ ] CSS variables for shadcn theming added to globals.css
- [ ] clsx, tailwind-merge, class-variance-authority installed
- [ ] npm run build succeeds

## Technical Spec

### Files to CREATE (generated by shadcn init)
| File | Path | Purpose |
|------|------|---------|
| components.json | /components.json | shadcn/ui configuration |
| lib/utils.ts | /lib/utils.ts | cn() utility function |

### Files to MODIFY
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| app/globals.css | shadcn adds CSS variables and @plugin directive |
| package.json | New dependencies from shadcn init |

### Implementation Details

Run:
npx shadcn@latest init

When prompted:
- Style: New York
- Base color: Neutral
- CSS variables for theming: Yes

Expected components.json (Tailwind v4):
{
	"$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema.json",
	"style": "new-york",
	"rsc": true,
	"tsx": true,
	"tailwind": {
		"config": "",
		"css": "app/globals.css",
		"baseColor": "neutral"
	},
	"aliases": {
		"components": "@/components",
		"utils": "@/lib/utils",
		"ui": "@/components/ui",
		"lib": "@/lib",
		"hooks": "@/hooks"
	}
}

Note: For Tailwind v4, config field is empty.

Expected lib/utils.ts:
import { type ClassValue, clsx } from "clsx";
import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge";

export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
	return twMerge(clsx(...inputs));
}

Post-init: npm run build

## Conventions
- Tabs for indentation
- Server components by default (rsc: true)
- Path aliases match tsconfig.json

## TDD Sequence
1. Run npx shadcn@latest init
2. Verify components.json created
3. Verify lib/utils.ts exports cn()
4. Verify globals.css has shadcn variables
5. npm run build

## Done Definition
- components.json correct for Tailwind v4
- lib/utils.ts exports cn()
- npm run build succeeds
